problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: The key to Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? is Quantum tunneling through energy barrier — specifically Quantum tunneling through — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
